name: Salesforce
description: A cloud-based CRM platform providing APIs (REST, SOAP, GraphQL) to programmatically access and manage CRM data, metadata, and platform features.

auth_methods.note: Salesforce REST API authentication uses OAuth 2.0 and documents multiple OAuth 2.0 authorization flows including Web Server (authorization code), User-Agent (implicit), JWT bearer, SAML bearer, Username-Password, and Device flows. OAuth access tokens are used as Bearer tokens.

credential_access.note: Salesforce offers a self-serve sign-up for a free Developer Edition org (described as a free, fully functional Salesforce org with no expiration date), which can be used for development and to create connected apps for API access.

api_surface.note: Salesforce provides a broad REST API for accessing Salesforce resources (including creating/updating/deleting records, working with sObjects, and running SOQL queries) and a separate Salesforce GraphQL API that provides a GraphQL interface to query and mutate Salesforce data and services.

buildability.note: Integrations can be built today using a free Salesforce Developer Edition org (self-serve signup) and by creating a connected app, which generates a consumer key and consumer secret used for OAuth-based authentication to Salesforce APIs.

queries: Create Connected App Salesforce consumer key secret
Salesforce Developer Edition signup API access
